title: ADHD Daily Planner & Focus System
script: My brain has 47 tabs open and none of them are loading. So I built a planner for our kind of brain. Focus blocks, brain dump pages, and dopamine wins that actually keep you going. It works WITH your brain, not against it. Comment FOCUS. Fourteen dollars.

title: Med Spa & Aesthetics Business Launch Blueprint
script: I planned my entire dream med spa business in one weekend. This blueprint walks you through every single step. Launch timeline, pricing templates, licensing by state, client pipeline. Everything from idea to opening day. Comment MEDSPA. Twenty-four dollars.
